calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Off Calendar

Motion To Schedule Default-Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Ivan Gold, Esq. for plaintiff(s) Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness: Richard Forester was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Hospitality International Group, LLC. for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $124,805.28
Attorney's Fees - $2625.00
Costs - $575.00
Total judgment in the amount of $128,005.28

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
